creator: mwisnicki+freebsd@gmail.com
text:
Seems like upstream is having problems with his servers.
For the time being, I have put a copy of the distfile here:

http://wisnia21.freeshell.org/f/ports/distfiles/lucidlife-0.9.1.tar.gz

I will have to delete it as soon as upstream returns to life, because I'm low
on space there, so it would be nice if someone could put it in more persistent
location.
